tasks.subject: Task 0: Verification harness + Common bases + pattern proof
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Data-driven PHPUnit test + Common base classes; migrate Cart (identical) and PricesDrop (v9 delta) to exercise every template.

**Files:** tests/Unit/Pages/PageFactorizationTest.php, src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Page.php, src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Page.php, src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Cart/Page.php, src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/PricesDrop/Page.php, src/Pages/v{7,8,9}/FrontOffice/{Cart,PricesDrop}/Page.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/PageFactorizationTest.php → green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/Unit/Pages/PageFactorizationTest.php", "src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/Cart/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/PricesDrop/Page.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/PageFactorizationTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cart+PricesDrop resolve v7/v8/v9", "PricesDrop delta preserved", "Cart selectors identical", "composer test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Migrate remaining FrontOffice pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply templates to the 25 remaining FO leaves + FO area base. Recipe: git mv v7 leaf→Common, rewrite namespace+base-use, overwrite v7/v8/v9 with pure stub.

**Files:** src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/<Name>/Page.php, src/Pages/v{7,8,9}/FrontOffice/**

**Verify:** composer test-unit → green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Pages/Common/FrontOffice/", "src/Pages/v7/FrontOffice/", "src/Pages/v8/FrontOffice/", "src/Pages/v9/FrontOffice/"], "verifyCommand": "composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all FO leaves resolve v7/v8/v9", "no duplicated content in version dirs", "composer test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Migrate BackOffice pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Factor BO pages incl. v9 deltas (Login selectors+method, Dashboard pageTitle='Tableau de bord') and v9-only Customer with @unverified v7/v8 stubs.

**Files:** src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/{Login,Dashboard,Customer}/Page.php, src/Pages/v{7,8,9}/BackOffice/**, tests/Unit/Pages/PageFactorizationTest.php (add testDashboardDeltaPreserved)

**Verify:** composer test-unit → green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/", "src/Pages/v7/BackOffice/", "src/Pages/v8/BackOffice/", "src/Pages/v9/BackOffice/", "tests/Unit/Pages/PageFactorizationTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Login/Dashboard/Customer resolve v7/v8/v9", "Dashboard delta preserved", "Login v9 override correct", "Customer @unverified v7/v8", "composer test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Final sweep and consistency check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm no duplicated content remains, every Page class loads, whole suite green.

**Verify:** grep sweep (only v9 Login defineSelectors remains) + PHP load-all loop ("all Page classes load") + composer test-unit green

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no leftover duplicated content", "all Page classes load", "composer test-unit green"]}
```
